belongs_to_collection.name: Protection Services Through Mechanics & Machines (PSTM&M/P.S.T.M.M.) COLLECTION

response.overview: The upcoming Tape #3 is a video set to release possibly in 2026 on MiniToon's YouTube Channel, being the third episode in the PSTM&M tape series.  It follows a lawsuit between Ryder Page and Protection Services Through Mechanics & Machines. Although unconfirmed, it is possible that the scene in PIG 64 showing models of Ryder being abused by Ronald Reilly has something to do with the lawsuit. Based on existing evidence, PSTM&M wins this battle, and Ryder is sentenced to prison. The ending is likely foreshadowed in the Nor skin, where an image of Ryder can occasionally be seen behind bars. According to AyJFried on Discord, the tape will be over 6 minutes.  This tape has been teased for months before release. Although it was said to be stated to be released after Piggy: Intercity, it was later made to release before Piggy: Intercity due to it being delayed again
response.title: PSTM&M Tape 3
